description: 10 test cases to evaluate AdCopilot improvement

test_cases.notes: Generic opening, no emotion, weak CTA
test_cases.ad_copy: Good earbuds available. Buy now. Sound is clear. Comfortable to wear. Available online. Order today and get fast delivery to your home.

test_cases.notes: Decent hook but no call to action, no urgency
test_cases.ad_copy: Experience the ultimate running shoe. Lightweight design with superior grip. Breathable material keeps your feet cool. Perfect for daily runs and marathons. Available in multiple colors.

test_cases.notes: Factual but no emotional trigger, no desire created
test_cases.ad_copy: Face wash with natural ingredients. Removes dirt and oil. Suitable for all skin types. Dermatologist tested. Use twice daily for best results. Buy from our website.

test_cases.notes: Has CTA but no clear reason to choose this app
test_cases.ad_copy: Order food now. Fast delivery available. Download our app today. Many restaurants available. Order in minutes. Get your food delivered.

test_cases.notes: Everything weak — no hook, no value, no emotion, no CTA
test_cases.ad_copy: Lipstick available in red color. Good quality. Long lasting. Buy now.

test_cases.notes: Very generic, no specifics, no urgency
test_cases.ad_copy: Learn online. Many courses available. Good teachers. Affordable price. Join today and start learning new skills for your career.

test_cases.notes: Decent but missing emotional trigger and urgency
test_cases.ad_copy: Build muscle faster with our premium whey protein. 25g protein per serving. Available in chocolate and vanilla flavors. Trusted by athletes. Order now from our website.

test_cases.notes: Has features but hook is weak and no social proof
test_cases.ad_copy: New smartphone with 108MP camera and 5000mAh battery. Fast processor for smooth performance. 5G enabled. Available in 3 storage variants. Buy now at best price.

test_cases.notes: Strong hook and emotion but weak CTA and no urgency
test_cases.ad_copy: Life is too short for bad coffee. Our single-origin beans are sourced from the finest farms in Coorg and Chikmagalur. Roasted fresh every week. Rich aroma and bold flavor in every cup.

test_cases.notes: Already good — tests if AdCopilot can improve strong ads
test_cases.ad_copy: Stop dreaming, start doing. Join CultFit today and transform your body in 90 days. 200+ workout classes, expert trainers, and a community that pushes you harder. First month FREE. Join now.
